name: libdata-validate-ip-perl
title: libdata-validate-ip-perl
description:
Perl module for IP validation
Data::Validate::IP collects IP validation routines to make input validation
and untainting easier and more readable. All functions return an untainted
value if the test passes, and undef if it fails. This means that you should
always check for a defined status explicitly. Don't assume the return value
will be true.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use libdata-validate-ip-perl because Perl module for IP validation.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use libdata-validate-ip-perl as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair libdata-validate-ip-perl with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `libdata-validate-ip-perl --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
